freshRuntimeAppName: Employee & Family Implant Application Management - FlowKey safe binding fix
summary: User manual runtime testing accepted the latest Employee Family Implant v1 package after the dateDiff unit fix and boarding-year quota model. This report distinguishes user-confirmed runtime pass items from paths not independently re-run by Codex in this final consolidation turn.

passed.evidence: Imported the 42.23 KB regenerated package as Employee Family Implant v1 Amount Preflight 20260516.
The imported app opened from the Shared Workspace search result.
Home page displayed the app title, guidance, and status cards.
Implant Application Request opened and rendered the trained section/grid layout.
Requester / Applicant defaulted to Renger from Yeeflow; applicant name, employee ID, boarding date, email, and line manager populated from the requester profile snapshot path.

passed.step: Applicant snapshot fields are readonly in the rendered form
passed.evidence: Applicant snapshot values appeared as non-editable display values; only Requester / Applicant remained selectable.
Product Selection rendered a row table with Product, Product Name, Product Type, Unit Price, Quantity, and Row Subtotal.
Selecting Standard Implant Package autofilled Product Name, Product Type = Standard Product, Unit Price = 2500.00, Quantity = 1, and Row Subtotal = 2500.
The Product Selection summary displayed Sum: 2500.00.

passed.step: Product summary persistence value is populated
passed.evidence: Refresh Product Summary wrote a readable JSON line summary containing ProductLookup, ProductName, ProductType, UnitPrice, Quantity, and ProductRowSubtotal.

passed.step: Family Quota Check uses product sublist total
passed.evidence: After Check Family Quota, Total Application Amount showed 2500.00 and Remaining Quota After changed from 15000.00 to 12500.00.
The confirmed Self/Family and Standard/Custom Package attachment matrix displayed in the form.
Imported/opened the FlowKey safe binding fix package in Chrome as Employee & Family Implant Application Management - FlowKey safe binding fix.

passed.step: Product Selection summary binding updates Total Application Amount
passed.evidence: Runtime form contained Standard Implant Package quantity 3 subtotal 7500 and Custom Implant Package quantity 2 subtotal 12000; Product Selection showed Sum: 19500.00 and Total Application Amount displayed 19500.00 without manual binding repair.

passed.step: Family Quota Check uses Total Application Amount after FlowKey fix
passed.evidence: With Total Application Amount = 19500.00 and Annual Quota Amount = 15000.00, Remaining Quota After displayed -4500.00 and Quota Exceeded displayed Yes.

Clicking Submit on the over-quota family request showed the warning: Family quota appears to be exceeded. Submission is blocked for v1; please adjust product rows or ask HR to verify quota/profile data.

notFullyProven.step: Valid submit path after reducing quota amount
notFullyProven.evidence: The over-quota submit path correctly warned/blocked. A separate within-quota submission still needs to be completed to prove HR Review task creation, Finance/Benefits routing, approval completion, and persistence rows.
Submission did not advance far enough to create a task.
Submission and custom package path were not completed.
No submitted workflow instance was completed in this run.

notFullyProven.step: Implant Applications ContentList record is created
notFullyProven.evidence: No completed submission was available to inspect.

notFullyProven.step: Family Quota Usage ContentList record is created
notFullyProven.evidence: No completed family submission was available to inspect.

notFullyProven.step: HR/task viewer does not overwrite applicant data

rootCauseLearning: The user-corrected export still uses the compact Product Selection summary binding shape: { "prefix": "__variables_", "value": "TotalApplicationAmount" }.

Runtime showed the visible sublist Sum updates, but policy-critical quota actions need an explicit preflight recalculation from ProductSelectionItems with arraySum(ProductSelectionItems, "ProductRowSubtotal", [], []).
RequesterApplicant should be required and default to Current User at the field/control level; generation should not add a redundant Set variable step to default it again.
FlowKey/form key text must not be a lowercase substring of reserved JSON property names. Known failure: EFI collided with prefix, producing pr<runtimeFlowKey>x in summary binding.
Validators should flag FlowKeys that collide with reserved property names and fail summary binding objects that contain value but no literal prefix key.
commitReason: Reusable FlowKey collision rules, validators, docs, and skills are safe to commit. The app package runtime remains a partial baseline, so raw .yap baseline is not staged.

latestLocalFix.rootCause: FlowKey EFI was replaced inside reserved JSON property name prefix, corrupting it to pr<runtimeFlowKey>x and breaking Product Selection summary binding.
latestLocalFix.fixedPackage: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant FlowKey Safe Summary Binding Fix 20260516.yap
latestLocalFix.wrapperInspection: ProductSelectionItems summary binding contains literal prefix and no pr<id>x corrupted keys.

remainingRuntimeItems: Valid path: family application within quota skips warning and reaches Submit form
Valid path: HR Review task opens
Over-quota path: warning appears and submit does not proceed unless designed override is confirmed
Self application is not blocked by family quota
Product summary binding and Total Application Amount still update
RequesterApplicant snapshot remains stable for task viewers
ContentList persistence rows are created and readable after approval

latestConditionFlowFix.targetStep: Warn when family quota is exceeded
latestConditionFlowFix.localInspection: Warn step has continue true; generated form has no pr<id>x corrupted keys.

acceptedManualRuntimeResult.evidenceSource: User manual runtime confirmation in chat on 2026-05-17
passedAfterFixes: Requester / Applicant remains editable, required, and defaults to Current User.
Requester / Applicant field change reruns applicant snapshot initialization and quota calculation.
Applicant logic uses RequesterApplicant or applicant snapshot variables, not Context:Current User after defaulting.
Product Selection sublist row subtotal, summary binding, and Total Application Amount work.
Family Quota Check runs on initialization and submit.
Eligibility Date variable/control dependency was removed.
Applicant Boarding Years number variable calculates with dateDiff raw unit string.
Family quota eligibility uses Applicant Boarding Years: 0 means effective quota 0; greater than 0 means eligible.
Family Quota Usage includes numeric Quota Cycle No.
Family usage query uses ApplicantEmployeeID + Quota Cycle No. + UsageStatus.
dateDiff function shape is fixed: params[2] is raw string "year".

codexFinalConsolidationNotes: Codex did not regenerate or operate Yeeflow UI during this consolidation step.
The latest runtime pass is accepted from the user manual test report.
Previously observed over-quota warning/block behavior remains documented in this report.
Do not claim any future tenant/profile data shape beyond the tested RequesterApplicant/dateDiff behavior.
